---
title: "About"
author: "Emily Mensch"
date: '2023-07-17'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## About 

I am an Ecology PhD student in the Department of Wildlife, Fish, and Conservation Biology at the University of California, Davis. My research interests are in aquatic ecology and conservation, and my dissertation research will involve understanding the interactions between waterbirds and fish in flooded rice fields in California's central valley, and how these affect ecosystem services for rice growers. I currently hold degrees in Fisheries and Wildlife (MSc) and Ecology (BSc).
